title: lotus corniculatus var. sennenii
intro: Lotus corniculatus var. sennenii, also known as Sennen's bird's foot trefoil, is a variety of the Lotus corniculatus plant, a perennial herb native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lotus corniculatus var. sennenii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Lotus corniculatus var. sennenii can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of uses and benefits.
